# Chapter 8: Queueing theory and capacity planning  (~100 pp)
- 8.1 Arrivals and service (12) · 8.2 M/M/1, M/M/c, M/G/1 (18) · 8.3 Networks of queues (15) · 8.4 Little's law in practice (10) · 8.5 Capacity planning and queueing-theoretic sizing (15) · 8.6 Worked examples: server farm, hospital ER, manufacturing line (18) · 8.7 Failure section: queues that became unstable; the cost of running too hot (12)

**Archetype**: balance, transport, scaling. **Project**: model a real queueing system in software; verify on observed data. **Exercises**: 30.
